title: Multi-Agent E-Commerce Ecosystem Architectures
description: This study develops a decentralized system where specialized AI agents autonomously manage inventory, front-end adjustments, and TCG price volatility.

title: AEO: The Post-SEO Marketing Era
description: This research quantifies how "Answer Engine Optimization" (AEO) is replacing traditional SEO as AI assistants become the primary gatekeepers for consumer queries.

title: Real-Time Neural Asset Generation
description: This paper introduces a generative pipeline that creates high-fidelity TCG card art and UI assets in real-time based on user interaction data.

title: Predictive Latency in Scalable Systems
description: Researchers propose a new "Model Context Protocol" (MCP) to manage data ingestion and low-latency inference in large-scale system development.
